tasks.title: Fix null reference in AuthManager
tasks.description: The AuthManager crashes when user is None. Add proper null checking before accessing user.email.
tasks.expected_output: Fixed AuthManager with proper null_check handling

tasks.description: Extract common logic into reusable method in ConfigManager. Maintain all existing functionality.
tasks.expected_output: Refactored ConfigManager with improved structure

tasks.expected_output: Implemented rate limiting in OrderProcessor

tasks.description: The FileHandler has an off-by-one error in the loop at line 35. The loop should iterate until i < len(items) instead of i <= len(items).
tasks.expected_output: Fixed FileHandler with proper off_by_one handling

tasks.title: Optimize FileHandler
tasks.description: Improve performance without changing behavior in FileHandler. Maintain all existing functionality.
tasks.expected_output: Refactored FileHandler with improved structure
